titleStmt.title: SII 20.100: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 100. (B.K. No. 95 of 1936-37.) BIJĀPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab No. 49 in the Archaeological Museum.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year 3, Kīlaka, Pushya ba. 10, Thursday, corresponding regularly to A.D. 1129, January 17.

The inscription records a gift of gold for worship and offerings to god Mūlasthāna. of Sīndige by Daṇḍanāyaka Vayijānāthayya, the Karaas, Manneya Sōvarasa and Kāḷamarasa of the Manneya of Sindige-12, Kummase-30, and Aṁkulage-50, when Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Permāḍidēva of Taṛikāḍu was governing Tarddavāḍi-1000 province

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmaThis is engraved in
ccāḻukya bhūlōkavarśada 3 neya kīlaka saṁvatsarada puṣya bahuḻa dasami brihaspativāra U
ttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa nimittavāgi śrīmanumahāmaṇḍaḷēsvara taṟikāḍa permmāḍidēvarasaru
tarddavāḍisāsiramāḻuttamire śrīmaddaṇḍanāyakaṁ vayijanāthayya pramukha karaṇaṁga ḻuṁThe letter ga is written above the line.
maṁneya sōvarasaruṁ siṁdige haṁneraḍuṁ kuṁmasemūvattu Aṁkulage Ayivattaṟa maṁneya kāḷa
marasanuṁ nāḍa prabhu gāvuṁḍu mukhyavāgi sindigeya śrīmūlastānadēvaraṁgabhōgapātrapāvuḻakkaṁ
Ūraloṁndugadyāṇa poṁna dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭarī dharmmama(ṁ)nūroḍeyapramukhamahā
janaṁgaḻu samastaprajegaḻuṁ seṭṭigutta pramukha nakaraṁgaḻu svadharmmadiṁ pratipāḷisuvaru . © nayadiṁ
dī dharmmamaṁ rakṣisidavarige dīrghāyumaṁ śrīyumakkuvidaṁ kāyade kāyva pāpige kurukṣētra
gaḷoḻu vāraṇāsiyoḻuṁ kōṭi munīṁdrararuṁ kavileyaṁ vēdāḍhyaraṁ koṁndu doṁdayasaṁ pordduguveṁ
ndu sāṟidapudī śaiḷākṣaraṁ dhātriyoḷu . ślōka . © bahubhiḥrvvasudhā dattārājabhirssaga rādibhiḥ ya
sya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmasētunrupāṇāṁ kālē kālē
pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētānu bhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rā
macaṁdraḥ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭikalpasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ . © seṭṭigutta pramukha nakharaṁgaḻu taḻamukhyavāgi tāvu koṇḍa
poṁge Aḍake 10 dhānya koṇḍalli māna 1 koṭṭalli mā 1 koṁṇḍahēṟiṁge Ele 50 ©
Digital edition of SII 20.100 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
